result.stdout:
Training Modules convertor v0.0.9
  Training Modules convertor

Usage
  dotnet LDBC.TrainingModulesConvertor.dll [command] [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  bootcamp list     Show all the bootcamps
  location list     Show all the locations under a bootcamp
  convert           Find challenges and convert to the training module file
  graph             Generate a graph of a challenge type in a training module file
  login             Log in to LDBC
  serve             Start a local web server to help test the training module
  visualize         Visualize a training module file

You can run `dotnet LDBC.TrainingModulesConvertor.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Find challenges and convert to the training module file

Usage
  dotnet LDBC.TrainingModulesConvertor.dll convert <folder> [options]

Parameters
* folder            Root folder of the training module. 

Options
  -o|--output       OutputFileName to use. Defaults to module.json Default: "module.json".
  -s|--skip         Skip the output to file. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Find challenges and convert to the training module file

Usage
  dotnet LDBC.TrainingModulesConvertor.dll convert <folder> [options]

Parameters
* folder            Root folder of the training module. 

Options
  -o|--output       OutputFileName to use. Defaults to module.json Default: "module.json".
  -s|--skip         Skip the output to file. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Description
  Generate a graph of a challenge type in a training module file

Usage
  dotnet LDBC.TrainingModulesConvertor.dll graph <folder> -t <value> [options]

Parameters
* folder            Root folder of the training module. 

Options
* -t                The challenge type to output 
  -f                The format of the output Valid values: "Ascii", "Dot". Default: "Ascii".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Description
  Visualize a training module file

Usage
  dotnet LDBC.TrainingModulesConvertor.dll visualize <folder> [options]

Parameters
* folder            Root folder of the training module. 

Options
  -a                Set to true, to also output the actions. Default: "False".
  -c                Set to true, to also output the contents. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Visualize a training module file

Usage
  dotnet LDBC.TrainingModulesConvertor.dll visualize <folder> [options]

Parameters
* folder            Root folder of the training module. 

Options
  -a                Set to true, to also output the actions. Default: "False".
  -c                Set to true, to also output the contents. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
